info.title: Ottaviano API
info.description: Versioned facade consumed by the Ottaviano (customer) and OttavianoKDS (operator) native apps. GENERATED from the server Zod contract (src/lib/api/v1/schemas.ts). Additive-only within v1; breaking changes mint v2. Every response uses one envelope: { data, meta? } | { error }.

category.description: Menu category (drives the KDS station filter)

throughputLastHour.description: Orders completed in the last 60 min

post.summary: Send a phone login code (customer app)

200.description: Code sent (devCode present only in non-prod with no SMS provider)

get.summary: One of the customer's own orders (ownership-gated)

get.description: SSE; each `data:` frame is { order: Order }. Ownership-gated. Powers the order tracker / Live Activity.

post.summary: Create an order (customer app / guest) — server-priced, idempotent
post.description: Zero-friction: no auth required (guest supplies name+phone); a customer Bearer token supplies the phone instead. Pass an Idempotency-Key header to make retries safe. Created unpaid; payment is a later increment.
Un-bump a fat-fingered completion so the ticket reappears on the expo column. Only completed orders are recallable; otherwise 409.

post.summary: Mark an order paid (counter settle) — idempotent
post.description: Stamps paidAt (cash / terminal at the counter) and confirms a pending order so it fires. meta.changed=false when already paid.
mode=printed when a printer host is configured, else mode=simulated with the exact plain-text preview the app can show or share.

get.summary: Owner fleet board (Atlas) — cross-truck KDS health
get.description: Live KDS health for every active truck: counts, predicted-ready/at-risk, capacity-vs-demand pace, rate metrics, promise accuracy + on-shift, and a fleet benchmark. Owner-level; respects token scope. Inherently cross-location.

get.summary: Floor tables for the POS dine-in table picker
get.description: Read-only list of a location's floor tables (id, number, seats, zone, status). Staff+; location-scoped + required. Twin of web /api/admin/floor/tables.

Throughput (orders completed in the last 60 min) + staff on the clock for the KDS KPI strip. Manager+; honors scope. With ?location= it reflects that truck; without one it aggregates across the operator's scoped locations.

post.summary: Cross-sell suggestions for a POS ticket
post.description: Runs the storefront getCartSuggestions engine over the ticket's item ids against the live menu. Body { locationSlug, itemIds }.

post.summary: Start payment for an order (Stripe PaymentIntent / Apple Pay)
post.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for the order's server-authoritative total and returns the client secret for the iOS PaymentSheet (Apple Pay + cards). Idempotent per order. Webhook payment_intent.succeeded marks the order paid.

get.summary: Live operator board (Server-Sent Events; Bearer header)
get.description: SSE stream; each `data:` frame is { orders: Order[] }. Location-scoped like /orders. The native app reads it as an AsyncSequence.
